underlying_goal: Investigate why a US user was receiving multiple Kinde login emails, determine if tracking exists to diagnose the issue, and then fix the root cause (double-submit on login form)
friction_detail: Claude couldn't find staged changes that were in a different repo, and the test initially failed due to HTML entity escaping of '>' to '>' in the data-action attribute.
brief_summary: User wanted to investigate why a user received 8 login emails, traced it to a double-submit bug via Honeycomb and BigQuery, then Claude created a Stimulus controller fix with tests and a PR — all largely successful with minor friction.
